I'm jealous. My {0} went on a date with someone else!
LanguageData.VSIE_SharingBurden.stages.0.description: It felt good to finally unbottle my feelings to a friend.
LanguageData.VSIE_SharingBurden.stages.0.label: sharing the burden
LanguageData.VSIE_SocialEnvironment.stages.0.descript: I am liked and respected here. These people need me.
LanguageData.VSIE_SocialEnvironment.stages.0.label: Good reputation
LanguageData.VSIE_SocialEnvironment.stages.1.descript: I'm not having fun here. Nobody seems to respect me!
LanguageData.VSIE_SocialEnvironment.stages.1.label: Bad reputation
LanguageData.VSIE_VentedOnMe.stages.0.description: My friend unbottled their feelings to me.
LanguageData.VSIE_VentedOnMe.stages.0.label: my friend vented to me
